| C1 | Verify Phase A locally |

**Create issues:** `./scripts/create-github-issues.sh`

**Full bodies:** [docs/TICKETS.md](../docs/TICKETS.md)

**Commits:** You commit each ticket. One issue = one commit with `Closes #N`.
